name: Chumpkin the kitten
description:
Kitten at you're door step

Chumpkin is a gray tabby cat with smooth short fur marked by dark, distinct stripes along its face and body. Its large, round eyes are striking and give it a bright, alert expression. The cat has a small pink nose, a white muzzle, and long whiskers that stand out against its patterned coat. Its ears are tall and pointed, adding to its attentive look
